title: push_subscription_set cannot update or destroy existing subscriptions
description: The method name is push_subscription_set but it only supports create. RFC 8620 §7.2 defines update (to refresh expires) and destroy for PushSubscription/set. A mobile client must be able to refresh an expiring subscription or remove one on logout. With only create exposed, callers will file issues asking for update/destroy. The public API name push_subscription_set implies full /set semantics. Either rename to push_subscription_create or add update/destroy parameters to match the method name.
close_reason: out of scope for this epic; update/destroy can be added in a follow-up
